title: Before Sunrise (SoL)
synopsis: Jesse and Celine star as two young people who meet--and whose lives are forever changed--on a train. They may have only one night, but when soul mates find each other, anything can happen Before Sunrise.

synopsis_lang.en: Jesse and Celine star as two young people who meet--and whose lives are forever changed--on a train. They may have only one night, but when soul mates find each other, anything can happen Before Sunrise.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 男主角謝西與女主角莎蓮偶然邂逅並相談甚歡。謝西原應先行獨自在維也納下車，等待隔天飛回美國的班機；莎蓮則預備回到巴黎。然而在同感相見恨晚與意猶未盡之下，兩人決定一起在維也納下車，共同度過剩下的時光。

subtitle: Chinese
